rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"IP blacklist/whitelist precedence: check blacklist BEFORE whitelist, not after. Existing rate-limiter.ts does this correctly, new code inverted the order.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Middleware factory pattern (create*Middleware) + limiter class with destroy() cleanup is the established convention in this codebase.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimiter.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"X-RateLimit-Reset should be Unix seconds (integer), not milliseconds. Client-side Retry-After parsing depends on this.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Tests co-located with source (rateLimit.test.ts alongside rateLimit.ts), using vi.useRealTimers() in afterEach and NextRequest factory helper.","scope":"src/middleware"}]}
